subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O Sender of manna and quails, Lord of the Throne and of the dust, inasmuch as Thou hast caused me to recognize the Manifestation of Thy Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا منزل المن و السلوی و مالک العرش و الثری بما عرفتنی مظهر امرک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
